evidence.value: `## Why` section missing or has no prose

findings.impact: `## Why` section missing or has no prose
findings.remediation: Has a Why section with at least one sentence
findings.title: Has a Why section with at least one sentence

evidence.value: one or more requirements have no scenarios

findings.impact: one or more requirements have no scenarios
findings.remediation: Every requirement has at least one scenario
findings.title: Every requirement has at least one scenario

evidence.value: one or more requirement IDs do not match `^REQ-[0-9]{3}$`

findings.impact: one or more requirement IDs do not match `^REQ-[0-9]{3}$`
findings.title: IDs use the `REQ-[0-9]{3}` format

findings.remediation: Uses SHALL/MUST language for normative requirements
findings.title: Uses SHALL/MUST language for normative requirements

evidence.value: design.md references requirement IDs not present in any baseline spec

findings.impact: design.md references requirement IDs not present in any baseline spec
findings.remediation: References only requirement ids present in specs
findings.title: References only requirement ids present in specs

evidence.value: found `- …` bullets that do not match the `- [ ] X.Y` checkbox format

findings.impact: found `- …` bullets that do not match the `- [ ] X.Y` checkbox format
findings.remediation: All tasks use `- [ ] X.Y` checkbox format
findings.title: All tasks use `- [ ] X.Y` checkbox format

evidence.value: one or more crates listed in the proposal have no matching spec file

findings.impact: one or more crates listed in the proposal have no matching spec file
findings.remediation: Every crate listed in the proposal has a matching spec file
findings.title: Every crate listed in the proposal has a matching spec file

evidence.value: design.md references requirement IDs that are not present in the baseline

findings.impact: design.md references requirement IDs that are not present in the baseline
findings.remediation: Every requirement id referenced in design.md exists in specs
